title: Sri Appakkudathaan Perumal Temple
tagline: Sri Appakkudathaan Perumal Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Sri Appakkudathaan Perumal Temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Appakkudathaan Perumal Temple or Thirupper Nagar, is a Perumal temple located in Koviladi, a village 10 miles (16 km) from Tiruchirapalli, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Appakkudathaan Perumal Temple or Thirupper Nagar, is a Perumal temple located in Koviladi, a village 10 miles (16 km) from Tiruchirapalli, Tamil Nadu, India. It is dedicated to Vishnu and is one of the Divya Desams—the 108 temples of Vishnu revered in Nalayira Divya Prabandham by the 12 poet saints or Alvars. This temple is located along the banks of the Cauvery River and is one of the five Pancharanga Kshetrams located on the banks of the Cauvery River. The temple is believed to be of significant antiquity, with contributions at different times from the Medieval Cholas.

topPlaces.description: Divyagnanesvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Koviladi in Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Maanturai Amravaneswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Maanturai Amravaneswarar Temple, is a temple dedicated to Hindu deity Shiva, located in Manturai, a village in the outskirts of Trichy, in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is one of the 275 Paadal Petra Sthalams, where the three of the most revered Nayanars (Saivite Saints), Appar and Tirugnana Sambandar have glorified the temple with their verses during the 7th-8th century.

topPlaces.name: Anbil Sathyavaheesvarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Anbil Alanthurai Temple (also called Sathyavaheeswarar temple) is a temple dedicated to Shiva, located on the banks of the Kollidam river in Anbil, a small village near Lalgudi. is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in the village of Tiruchotruthurai, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Appakkudathaan Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Appakkudathaan Perumal Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Appakkudathaan Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (21 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (22 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Appakkudathaan Perumal Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Appakkudathaan Perumal Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Appakkudathaan Perumal Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Appakkudathaan Perumal Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Appakkudathaan Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Koviladi, Thanjavur, Divyagnanesvarar Temple, Koviladi, Kachamangalam, Maanturai Amravaneswarar Temple, Anbil Sathyavaheesvarar Temple.
